detectors.description:

	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#727)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#801-813)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#733)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#785)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#947)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#929)
	SHITAKIRINOBAKE._rOwned (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE._takeTeam(uint256) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#941-949)
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#901-937)
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE.balanceOf(address) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#489-493)
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE.constructor() (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#423-453)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#785)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#955)
	SHITAKIRINOBAKE._rTotal (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE._getCurrentSupply() (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#1097-1107)
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#953-959)
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE.constructor() (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#423-453)
	- SHITAKIRINOBAKE.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SHITAKIRINOBAKE.sol#585-607)
